Minor League K% Analysis

Uses completed 2025 rows plus current 2026 rows. League-age and level-age points are PA-weighted. Correlation controls use partial correlations by residualizing K% and wRC+ against the listed controls.

Within-League Age Slopes

Slopes are fitted from PA-weighted league-age buckets with at least 200 PA per age point and at least four age points in the league.
